system.abilityDescription:
Aesthetic options cost 1 less scrip for you (min 0). Gain access to the “Expanded Aesthetics” below.

EXPANDED AESTHETICS:

-Fancy Shoes
2 Scrip

Formal footwear for exorcists in the form of heels, oxfords, etc.

-Fancy Undergarments 
3 Scrip 

Underwear or undergarments for off duty wear. Lingerie, briefs, garter belts, etc.

-Make Up Options 
2 Scrip 

A make up kit that can be applied before mission deployment.

-Handbag 
4 Scrip 

A high end designer bag that can carry small objects. Can be used when deployed.
